@mixin.description: Defines a reusable block of CSS declarations and logic that can accept parameters with optional defaults, enabling DRY styling patterns across stylesheets with @include invocations.

@include.description: Invokes a previously defined mixin by name with arguments, optionally passing a content block that the mixin can inject using @content for flexible wrapper-style mixins.

@extend.description: Shares CSS rules between selectors by making the current selector inherit all styles of the extended selector, generating combined selector groups in the compiled CSS output.

@use.description: Imports and namespaces a Sass module, making its variables, mixins, and functions available under a namespace, replacing @import with better encapsulation and deduplication.

@forward.description: Re-exports members from another module, optionally adding a prefix or hiding specific members, enabling library authors to compose public APIs from multiple source files.

@function.description: Defines a custom function that computes and returns a value using @return, callable anywhere a CSS value is expected for dynamic calculations within stylesheets.

@each.description: Iterates over items in a list or key-value pairs in a map, generating CSS rules for each iteration, commonly used for producing utility classes or theme variations.

darken.description: Returns a darker version of the given color by decreasing its lightness by the specified percentage amount, useful for generating hover states and shadow color variations.

lighten.description: Returns a lighter version of the given color by increasing its lightness by the specified percentage amount, commonly used for creating highlight effects and tint variations.

map-get.description: Retrieves the value associated with a key in a Sass map data structure, returning null if the key is not found, essential for theme configuration and design token lookups.

color.adjust.signature: color.adjust($color, $red: null, $green: null, $blue: null, $hue: null, $saturation: null, $lightness: null, $alpha: null) -> Color
color.adjust.description: Creates a new color by adjusting one or more properties of an existing color by fixed amounts, providing precise control over color channel manipulation in the modern module system.

map.merge.description: Combines two maps into a new map where keys from the second map override matching keys in the first, enabling configuration override patterns and theme extension.

list.append.description: Returns a new list with the given value appended to the end, using the specified separator or inheriting the existing list separator for consistent formatting.

math.div.description: Performs division of two numbers, replacing the deprecated slash-as-division syntax with an explicit function call to avoid ambiguity with CSS separator slashes.

string.unquote.description: Removes quotes from a Sass string, returning it as an unquoted string suitable for use as CSS identifiers, property names, and other contexts requiring unquoted values.
